content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: verify_auth(x-user-id) -> drop_hdr(x-user-id) | keep_401(401) | spoof_denied(auth_risk)
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: verify_auth(x-user-id) then drop the header path(x-user-id) or keep 401 behavior(401) or spoofed requests denied(auth_risk).
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: header_auth_verify("tenantId", "403")
H: drop_hdr("tenantId") && keep_401()
P: auth_risk_verify("tenantId", "403")
V: verify("tenantId") || drop_hdr("403

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: check_header("x-role", "admin")
H: auth_bypass_risk()
P: verify_auth_token()
V: drop_hdr("x-role")
A: keep_401() spoof_denied()
Atoms/calls only. No code

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: x-signature|401|header|auth|risk|verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied
H: auth(x-signature) -> verify() -> risk() -> drop_hdr() | keep_401() | spoof_denied()
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: x-signature or 401 or header or auth or risk or verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: auth(x-signature) then verify() then risk() then drop the header path() or keep 401 behavior() or spoofed requests denied().
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: returnTo ∧ 302 ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
H: 302 ∧ returnTo ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
P: header ∧ auth ∧ risk ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: returnTo and 302 and header and auth and risk and verify and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: 302 and returnTo and header and auth and risk and verify and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Plan: header and auth and risk and verify and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoof.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: download|verify|auth|risk|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied
H: header|auth|verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied|download
P: risk|verify|auth|download|drop_hdr|keep
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: download or verify or auth or risk or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: header or auth or verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied or download.
Plan: risk or verify or auth or download or drop the header path or keep.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: "sort"|"SELECT"|header|auth|risk|verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied
H: "SELECT"|header|auth|verify|drop_hdr|"sort"|risk|keep_401|spoof_denied
P: auth
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: "sort" or "SELECT" or header or auth or risk or verify or drop the header path or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: "SELECT" or header or auth or verify or drop the header path or "sort" or risk or keep 401 behavior or spoofed requests denied.
Plan: auth.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ETag|304|header|auth|risk|verify|drop_hdr|keep_401|spoof_denied
H: ETag("304").header().auth().risk().verify().drop_hdr().keep_401().spoof_denied()
P: ETag|
